system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Command against Resolve
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You gaze fiercely at your opponent, giving them a glimpse of your internal strength through your eyes, draining their confidence. Make a Command Roll against Resolve. On a Success the target is unable to land any Total Successes against you or your allies. On a Total Success the duration is doubled. This lasts for 1 round per Rank of Neigong. Works on one target. Cathartic: Works on multiple targets, 2 per Rank of Qi.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Target cannot land Total Successes against the user or allies for 1 round per Rank of Neigong
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Target cannot land Total Successes against the user or allies for 2 rounds per Rank of Neigong
system.catharticTargetEffects: As normal, but affects multiple targets: 2 per Rank of Qi
system.catharticEffect: Works on multiple targets, 2 per Rank of Qi.
